proof_summary: ARCHBP-026 is complete: Home Manager desktop and profile startup ownership is proven under the one foundation install owner. The wrapped package task YZXCONV-022 is now Complete in the yazelix runtime convergence spine with its proof bound to a fresh evidence report (sha256 614893ab…): the home_manager flake check — which encodes the red-test subjects for absence, second-profile selection, generated-runtime-as-source, and shadow launchers — builds green together with single_profile_contract and flexnetos_foundation_contracts, yzx doctor resolves every runtime component from the nix store, and the generated runtime traces to reviewed inputs through the codex provenance gates. The nested proof links into the root ledger through this record, closing the root task.
